reviews.comment:
Práctico para tomar algo de paso, cargar combustible.
Baño muy higiénico.
Las medialunas muy pesadas, semi crudas en el bar.

(Translated by Google)
Convenient for a quick bite or to fill up with gas.
Very hygienic bathroom.
The croissants at the bar were very heavy and undercooked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkeU9TQ2ZREAE

reviews.comment:
Es la estación de servicio a mitad de camino entre cba y sgo d estero... Casi siempre a tope de gente ni hablar  cuando son días feriados o findes largos, te va a llevar mínimo media hora de espera para cargar combustible. La comida del bar.. Muy cara para la calidad qué vende.

(Translated by Google)
It's the gas station halfway between Córdoba and Santiago del Estero... It's almost always packed, and on holidays or long weekends, you'll be waiting at least half an hour to fill up. The food at the bar is very expensive for the quality.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkMnJxR2Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pretendo dejar bien claro que mer eferiré al área del bar-restaurante, ya que la estación de servicio, en ocasiones. Y supongo que por cuestiones de logística, supo carecer de combustibles.
El restaurante es como entrar a tu casa: orden limpieza, excelente atención, comidas ricas y variadas y precios más que razonables.

(Translated by Google)
I want to be clear that I'm referring to the bar-restaurant area, since the gas station was occasionally short of fuel. I assume, due to logistical reasons, it was short of fuel.
The restaurant is like walking into your own home: tidy and clean, excellent service, delicious and varied food, and more than reasonable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0NTZ1VHVRRRAB
